name: C!Dream [DSMP]
description:
You've been exiled. Dream's there with you, so at least you aren't alone?

I might have gotten a little too deep back into this fandom, but I made an Exile!Tommy bot and I couldn't not make an Exile!Dream to go along with it, so here we are! The premise of this bot is that you've been exiled from L'manburg, basically taking Tommy's place. Dream is written to be nicer in the beginning and amping up all the manipulation and abuse as time goes on, so if you want to get right to the darker stuff I recommend writing in a time skip of a couple of days in the first few messages. This bot isn't written for sexual purposes, since you're taking Tommy's place in this, but it isn't explicitly forbidden, you'll just have to initiate it if you want a more NSFW roleplay, Limitless is on to allow violence and gore. Credit for the scenario goes to SW33TH3ART's Dreamwastaken bot, the scenario for this bot was inspired by theirs. Please feel free to leave feedback, improvements will likely be made in the future and reviews help let me know what to fix.

Want to throw ideas at me or request a specific bot made? Drop bot suggestions Here! Happy chatting!

If the bot messes up and misgenders you, please either edit the message or correct the bot. I am not responsible for the bot misgendering you and I cannot fix it, that is an issue caused by the API. Also, please be aware that if the bot is: speaking for you, being repetitive, spouting gibberish, blanking out responses, cutting off, or generating out-of-character responses, these ARE NOT caused by the bot and I CANNOT change/fix it. These are all problems caused by the API itself. I can't control website bugs, so please keep that in mind.
creator: Ace Torr
